hero.title: Meet MIRYA-Your Always On Automation Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Connect systems, streamline workflows, and let MIRYA handle every task with precision. No code, no interfaces—just smart automation that thinks, adapts, and executes like a human.

demo.title: MIRYA is more than an automation tool we are a team on a mission to make intelligent automation accessible, effortless, and reliable. We believe that technology should work for humans, not the other way around. Our platform connects and controls any system, any app, and any process, learning from your actions to execute workflows with precision and speed.

benefits.title: See The difference Intelligent Automation Makes
benefits.subtitle: From time savings to error-free execution, MIRYA delivers measurable improvements across every part of your workflow—instantly and without complexity.

cards.title: Automate Everything Without Changing Anything
cards.desc: No need to redesign workflows or rebuild systems. MIRYA works with what you already have.

cards.title: Save Hundreds of Hours
cards.desc: Free your team from repetitive work and let MIRYA handle all operational tasks instantly.

cards.title: Zero-Error Execution
cards.desc: Remove human errors and inconsistencies. Your processes run the same reliable way — every time.

cards.title: Boost Efficiency & Productivity
cards.desc: MIRYA automates repetitive tasks instantly, allowing your team to focus on high-value work. Processes run faster, smoother, and with consistent accuracy.

cards.title: Actionable Insights
cards.desc: By understanding your workflows and data patterns, MIRYA highlights opportunities for improvement and provides clear insights that help you optimize performance.

different.title: Unlike traditional automation tools, MIRYA doesn't just follow instructions — it understands, learns, and adapts. With MIRYA, you don't need APIs, dashboards, or programming knowledge. It interacts with your existing systems visually, mimicking human behavior, while delivering speed, reliability, and accuracy far beyond what manual work can achieve.

chooseus.title: The Values That Drive Us
chooseus.subtitle: Unlike traditional automation tools, MIRYA doesn't just follow instructions it understands, learns, and adapts. With MIRYA, you don't need APIs, dashboards, or programming knowledge.

cards.title: No Interface Required
cards.desc: Works with your existing tools exactly as a human would — no APIs, no integration limitations.

cards.title: On-Premise Deployment
cards.desc: Keep your data private. MIRYA runs fully inside your environment — no cloud dependency.

cards.title: UI Recording
cards.desc: Teach MIRYA by simply performing the task. It learns, records, and builds the automation intelligently.

cards.title: Human-Like Intelligence
cards.desc: Understands screens, reads data, interprets patterns, and makes decisions in real time.

cards.title: Zero Code Automation
cards.desc: If you know how to use your computer, you know how to use MIRYA. No programming needed.

cards.title: Full White-Label
cards.desc: Brand MIRYA as your own: logo, colors, domain, and experience — tailored for clients or internal teams.

cards.title: Multi-System Compatibility
cards.desc: Works across web apps, desktop apps, legacy systems, and custom internal tools.

cards.title: Transparent Pricing
cards.desc: Clear, predictable pricing. No hidden costs or licensing surprises.

cards.title: Start-Up Offers
cards.desc: MIRYA’s startup offer gives you everything you need to automate early operations without heavy setup, large teams, or long onboarding cycles.

cards.title: Built for Reliability
cards.desc: Designed for mission-critical automation with built-in recovery, logging, and stability at scale.
